summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Colegio Técnico Romega institutional website. Backend APIs are 100% functional, frontend navigation and admin authentication working correctly. Minor UI testability issues with contact form field selectors.

ui_bugs.issue: Form input fields lack proper name attributes, making automated testing difficult
ui_bugs.selector: input fields use generic classes without name/id attributes

passed_tests: All 16 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Public pages navigation (Home, About, Academics, News, Resources, Contact)
Admin dashboard access and statistics display
CRUD operations for news and resources
